name: Menu_Banco_Emitidos
wl_code:
nProcesar is int=0
IF sIdentifier="155" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 155, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 156, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 157, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 156, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 157, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="156" OR sIdentifier="157" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, sIdentifier, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 156, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado137 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 157, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado138 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked

SIATEC1_IA
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 155, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado137=1 AND nEstado138=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado137=0 AND nEstado138=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado137=1 OR nEstado138=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
Local procedure Menu_Bancos
